settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, preferences, and account.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.displayNameHint: Display name is synced from your Telegram profile.
preferences.toneHint: How your KIN speaks to you.
preferences.notificationsHint: Receive updates about new features and companion activity.

proactive.title: Proactive Companion
proactive.description: Let your companion anticipate your needs — meeting prep, follow-ups, and timely nudges.

memory.title: Memory Management
memory.count: {count, plural, one {# memory} other {# memories}} stored

installApp.title: Install App
installApp.description: Add KIN to your device for instant access and offline support.
installApp.installed: KIN is installed on this device
installApp.browserHint: Open this page in a supported browser (Chrome, Edge, Safari) to install KIN.

dataPrivacy.title: Data & Privacy
dataPrivacy.description: When private, your companion uses only local AI. When shared, frontier AI handles complex requests and helps your companion learn.
dataPrivacy.childLocked: 🔒 Privacy is set to private for child accounts. Only local AI is used.
dataPrivacy.keepPrivateHint: Your companion uses only the local model. Nothing leaves your device.
dataPrivacy.helpLearnHint: Complex questions use frontier AI. Responses improve your companion over time.
dataPrivacy.moveDescription: Transfer your companion, conversations, and training data between devices or hosting modes.

chat.emptyState: Start chatting with {name}. Ask anything about {tagline}.

welcome.title: Welcome to KIN
welcome.subtitle: KIN gives you a deeply capable AI companion that feels personal from the first conversation. We handle the intelligence behind the curtain so you can stay focused on what matters.
welcome.featureUnderstandsDesc: Your KIN starts with your goals, context, and style so it feels useful from the very first reply.
welcome.featureComplexityDesc: Memory, model routing, and advanced AI stay behind the curtain while the experience stays calm and clear.
welcome.featureChannelsDesc: Meet your KIN in the dashboard now, then keep the relationship going across channels as your world moves.
welcome.skipToCompanions: Already know which KIN you want? Jump to companions →

chooseCompanion.title: Choose Your Companion
chooseCompanion.subtitle: Each companion has unique strengths. Pick the one that fits your needs.
chooseCompanion.quickSetup: Quick Setup — skip to finish with defaults

quickIntro.pickSubtitle: Choose someone who matches your vibe.

preferences.title: Tell Your KIN How To Help
preferences.subtitle: Set the tone, pace, and priorities for your first real conversation.
preferences.nameLabel: What should your KIN call you?
preferences.namePlaceholder: Your name, nickname, or what feels right
preferences.guidanceLabel: How much guidance do you want?
preferences.goalsLabel: What do you want help with first?
preferences.privacyLabel: How should your KIN handle sensitive context?
preferences.keepPrivateDesc: Stay local-first for personal or sensitive conversations.
preferences.letLearnDesc: Use frontier models when it helps and improve over time.

ready.title: Your KIN Is Ready
ready.subtitle: We've handled the setup behind the curtain. Your first conversation will open with context about your goals, your style, and what matters most right now.
ready.firstConversation: We'll open a real first conversation so {name} can greet you like a companion, not a blank chatbot.
ready.telegramCTA: Chat with your companion on Telegram anytime at
